en: And the people complained in the hearing of the LORD about their misfortunes, and when the LORD heard it, his anger was kindled, and the fire of the LORD burned among them and consumed some outlying parts of the camp.
zh: 人民發怨言，惡聲達到耶和華的耳中；耶和華聽見了，就發烈怒；耶和華的火就在他們中間焚燒，燒毀了營地的邊界。

en: Then the people cried out to Moses, and Moses prayed to the LORD, and the fire died down.
zh: 人民向摩西呼求，摩西懇求耶和華，火就熄了，

en: So the name of that place was called Taberah, because the fire of the LORD burned among them.
zh: 就稱那地方作他備拉，因為耶和華的火曾在他們中間焚燒。

en: Now the rabble that was among them had a strong craving. And the people of Israel also wept again and said, "Oh that we had meat to eat!
zh: 他們中間的閒雜人起了貪慾，甚至連以色列人也哭著說：“誰給我們肉吃呢？

en: We remember the fish we ate in Egypt that cost nothing, the cucumbers, the melons, the leeks, the onions, and the garlic.
zh: 我們記得在埃及的時候，可以不花錢吃魚，還有黃瓜、西瓜、韭菜、蔥和蒜。

en: But now our strength is dried up, and there is nothing at all but this manna to look at."
zh: 現在我們的心都枯乾了；除了這嗎哪以外，在我們眼前，甚麼都沒有。”

en: Now the manna was like coriander seed, and its appearance like that of bdellium.
zh: 這嗎哪仿佛芫荽子，又好像珍珠。

en: The people went about and gathered it and ground it in hand-mills or beat it in mortars and boiled it in pots and made cakes of it. And the taste of it was like the taste of cakes baked with oil.
zh: 人民走來走去，把嗎哪拾起來，或用磨磨碎，或用臼搗碎，或用鍋煮，或做成餅，它的滋味好像油餅的滋味。

en: When the dew fell upon the camp in the night, the manna fell with it.
zh: 夜間露水降在營上的時候，嗎哪也隨著降下來。

en: Moses heard the people weeping throughout their clans, everyone at the door of his tent. And the anger of the LORD blazed hotly, and Moses was displeased.
zh: 摩西聽見人民都在各人的帳棚門口哀哭，耶和華就大發烈怒，摩西也不高興。

en: Moses said to the LORD, "Why have you dealt ill with your servant? And why have I not found favor in your sight, that you lay the burden of all this people on me?
zh: 摩西對耶和華說：“你為甚麼苦待你的僕人，為甚麼我沒有在你面前蒙恩呢？竟把管理這人民的重擔全放在我身上呢？

en: Did I conceive all this people? Did I give them birth, that you should say to me, 'Carry them in your bosom, as a nurse carries a nursing child,' to the land that you swore to give their fathers?
zh: 這人民豈是我懷的胎，豈是我生的嗎？你竟對我說：‘把他們抱在懷裡，像養育之父抱吃奶的孩子，直抱到你起誓應許給他們列祖的地方去。’

en: Where am I to get meat to give to all this people? For they weep before me and say, 'Give us meat, that we may eat.'
zh: 我從哪裡得肉給這人民吃呢？因為他們都向我哭著說：‘你給我們肉吃吧！’

en: I am not able to carry all this people alone; the burden is too heavy for me.
zh: 我不能獨自擔當管理這人民的責任，因為實在太重了。

en: If you will treat me like this, kill me at once, if I find favor in your sight, that I may not see my wretchedness."
zh: 你既然這樣待我，如果我在你面前蒙恩，求你把我殺了，免得我看見自己的苦楚。”

en: Then the LORD said to Moses, "Gather for me seventy men of the elders of Israel, whom you know to be the elders of the people and officers over them, and bring them to the tent of meeting, and let them take their stand there with you.
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“你要從以色列的長老中為我召聚七十個人，就是你認識的民間的長老和官長，領他們到會幕那裡，叫他們與你一同站在那裡。

en: And I will come down and talk with you there. And I will take some of the Spirit that is on you and put it on them, and they shall bear the burden of the people with you, so that you may not bear it yourself alone.
zh: 我要在那裡降臨，與你說話，也要把在你身上的靈，分給他們，他們就與你一同擔當管理人民的責任，免得你獨自擔當。

en: And say to the people, 'Consecrate yourselves for tomorrow, and you shall eat meat, for you have wept in the hearing of the LORD, saying, "Who will give us meat to eat? For it was better for us in Egypt." Therefore the LORD will give you meat, and you shall eat.
zh: 你要對人民說：‘你們應當自潔，預備明天可以吃肉，因為你們哭著向耶和華說：“誰給我們肉吃呢？我們在埃及多好。”所以耶和華必給你們肉吃。

en: You shall not eat just one day, or two days, or five days, or ten days, or twenty days,
zh: 你們不是吃一天兩天，不是吃五天十天，也不是吃二十天，

en: but a whole month, until it comes out at your nostrils and becomes loathsome to you, because you have rejected the LORD who is among you and have wept before him, saying, "Why did we come out of Egypt?"'"
zh: 而是吃一個整月，直到肉從你們的鼻孔裡噴出來，成為你們厭惡的東西；因為你們輕視了住在你們中間的耶和華，在他面前哭著說：“我們為甚麼出埃及呢？”’”

en: But Moses said, "The people among whom I am number six hundred thousand on foot, and you have said, 'I will give them meat, that they may eat a whole month!'
zh: 摩西說：“這與我同住的人，能行的男人就有六十萬，你還說：‘我要給他們肉吃，使他們可以吃一個整月。’

en: Shall flocks and herds be slaughtered for them, and be enough for them? Or shall all the fish of the sea be gathered together for them, and be enough for them?"
zh: 難道把羊群和牛群都給他們宰了，就夠他們吃嗎？或是把海裡所有的魚都給他們聚了來，就夠他們吃嗎？”

en: And the LORD said to Moses, "Is the LORD's hand shortened? Now you shall see whether my word will come true for you or not."
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：“耶和華的手臂縮短了嗎？現在你要看看我的話對你應驗不應驗。”

en: So Moses went out and told the people the words of the LORD. And he gathered seventy men of the elders of the people and placed them around the tent.
zh: 於是摩西出來，把耶和華的話告訴人民，又從民間的長老中召聚了七十個人來，使他們站在會幕的周圍。

en: Then the LORD came down in the cloud and spoke to him, and took some of the Spirit that was on him and put it on the seventy elders. And as soon as the Spirit rested on them, they prophesied. But they did not continue doing it.
zh: 耶和華在雲中降臨，對摩西說話，把摩西身上的靈，分給那七十個長老；靈停在他們身上的時候，他們就說預言，以後卻沒有再說。

en: Now two men remained in the camp, one named Eldad, and the other named Medad, and the Spirit rested on them. They were among those registered, but they had not gone out to the tent, and so they prophesied in the camp.
zh: 那時還有兩個人留在營裡；一個名叫伊利達，一個名叫米達；靈也停在他們身上。他們原是在被錄取的人中，卻沒有到會幕那裡去；他們就在營裡說預言。

en: And a young man ran and told Moses, "Eldad and Medad are prophesying in the camp."
zh: 有個少年人跑來，告訴摩西：“伊利達和米達在營中說預言。”

en: And Joshua the son of Nun, the assistant of Moses from his youth, said, "My lord Moses, stop them."
zh: 摩西的侍從，嫩的兒子約書亞，就是摩西所揀選的，回答說：“我主，摩西，請你制止他們。”

en: But Moses said to him, "Are you jealous for my sake? Would that all the LORD's people were prophets, that the LORD would put his Spirit on them!"
zh: 摩西對他說：“你為我的緣故嫉妒嗎？但願耶和華的人民都是先知，但願耶和華把他的靈降在他們身上。”

en: And Moses and the elders of Israel returned to the camp.
zh: 於是摩西和以色列的長老，都回營去了。

en: Then a wind from the LORD sprang up, and it brought quail from the sea and let them fall beside the camp, about a day's journey on this side and a day's journey on the other side, around the camp, and about two cubits above the ground.
zh: 有風從耶和華那裡吹起，把鵪鶉由海面颳來，散落在營地；鵪鶉在營的四周，這邊約有一天的路程，那邊約有一天的路程，離地面約有一公尺。

en: And the people rose all that day and all night and all the next day, and gathered the quail. Those who gathered least gathered ten homers. And they spread them out for themselves all around the camp.
zh: 人民起來，那一天終日終夜，並次日一整天，都在捕捉鵪鶉，最少的也捕捉了約二千公升；他們都擺在營地的四周。

en: While the meat was yet between their teeth, before it was consumed, the anger of the LORD was kindled against the people, and the LORD struck down the people with a very great plague.
zh: 肉在他們牙齒之間，還沒有嚼爛，耶和華的怒氣就向人民發作，用極重的災禍擊打他們。

en: Therefore the name of that place was called Kibroth-hattaavah, because there they buried the people who had the craving.
zh: 於是那地方名叫基博羅．哈他瓦，因為他們在那裡埋葬起了貪慾的人。

en: From Kibroth-hattaavah the people journeyed to Hazeroth, and they remained at Hazeroth.
zh: 人民從基博羅．哈他瓦起行，到哈洗錄去，就住在哈洗錄。
